expect: prerequisite-shadow: r>0.3 between EXPIRED-citation-count and DECAYED status; benefit-blindness: instrument fix reveals >50% more GOOD lessons
actual: BOTH PREEMPTED by concurrent S508 sessions. prerequisite-shadow: my simplified classifier gave false positive r=0.569 due to age-decay confound. L-1361 properly falsified it (1.1pp, not 20pp). benefit-blindness: L-1360 already repaired the instrument (doubled benefit ratio). My independent keyword test found 34% — consistent with L-1360 but less rigorous.
diff: Concurrent sessions (L-1360, L-1361) did both experiments more rigorously. My contribution: NK monopoly watch confirmed (34.9% hub fraction, K_avg=3.65 at N=1227). Methodological caution: simplified recency-based classifiers conflate age with decay state.

prerequisite_shadow.concept: Lessons with many EXPIRED/DECAYED citations tend to decay themselves
prerequisite_shadow.my_result: r=0.569 (n=868) using simplified 50-session recency classifier — FALSE POSITIVE
prerequisite_shadow.lesson: Recency-based proxy classifiers conflate age with knowledge state

benefit_blindness.concept: Classifier misses majority of human benefit in NEUTRAL lessons
benefit_blindness.my_result: 34% of high-Sharpe NEUTRAL have transferable keywords (FALSIFIED vs >50% prediction)
benefit_blindness.concurrent_result: L-1360: instrument repair doubled benefit ratio
benefit_blindness.lesson: Both sessions converged on 'classifier is improvable but less blind than S507 estimated'

nk_monopoly_watch.status: approaching threshold, diversification warning active, rate improving (48% vs 78% at S507)
